mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_sec_idata (id, create_by, create_date, parent_id, del_flag, env, data_id, raw_data, opt_time, integrity_value, opt_name, valid_pass, valid_time) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.env}, #{item.dataId}, #{item.rawData}, #{item.optTime}, #{item.integrityValue}, #{item.optName}, #{item.validPass}, #{item.validTime} )
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_sec_idata where parent_id = #{parentId} and env = #{env} and data_id in
#{dataId}
